title: zjlab-BioGene/CHOOSER: v1.0
author: ZhejiangLab-BioGene
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
CHOOSER v1.0: Discovering CRISPR-Cas system with self-processing pre-crRNA capability by foundation models 
 his repository hosts the custom code of CHOOSER (Cas HOmlog Observing and SElf-processing scReening), a novel, effective and unified AI framework for alignment-free discovery of novel CRISPR-Cas systems with self-processing precursor CRISPR RNA (pre-crRNA) capability utilizing protein foundation models.
steps_raw:
CHOOSER v1.0: Discovering CRISPR-Cas system with self-processing pre-crRNA capability by foundation models 
 his repository hosts the custom code of CHOOSER (Cas HOmlog Observing and SElf-processing scReening), a novel, effective and unified AI framework for alignment-free discovery of novel CRISPR-Cas systems with self-processing precursor CRISPR RNA (pre-crRNA) capability utilizing protein foundation models.
